title: APM: Session Hijacking - Rapid Session Changes
description: Detects rapid session ID changes from a single source IP within a short window, indicating potential session hijacking, session fixation, or stolen session cookies.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop', 'SOC Application Logs') and 'Span Name' like '%HTTP%' | stats distinctcount('Session ID') as SessionCount, count as Requests by 'Client IP', 'User Agent', 'service.name' | where SessionCount > 5 | sort -SessionCount
